case_title: CLARENCE G. WASHINGTON VS. THE SALVATION ARMY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G. AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G. THE SALVATION ARMY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00, $8K TO SATISFY MEDICAL LIEN, REMAINDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 90 DAYS (CALENDAR)OF TOTAL PER SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-13-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RICHARD LARSON, MAJOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: COGENCY GLOBAL INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, CLARENCE G. AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF CLARENCE G. WASHINGTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RICHARD LARSON, MAJOR. COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO SEND DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT SO THEY CAN PAY THE CLAIM. DEFENDANT PROVIDES CONTACT NUMBER TO PLAINTIFF IN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY
